title: Example Epic Title
description: High-level context describing the customer or operator problem and desired outcome. This should explain the strategic value and overall scope of the epic.
rationale: Why this epic is needed - explain the business case and strategic value
notes: Optional: Free-form planning notes, questions, or considerations.

title: Example Feature Name
description: Narrative that frames the scope and intent of this feature. Explain what capabilities this feature delivers and why it matters.
acceptance_criteria: Start each criterion with a measurable condition
notes: Optional: Planning commentary, open questions, or design considerations.

title: User-facing statement of value
story: As a <persona>, I want <capability> so that <outcome>.
description: Expanded context for the story. Include background, constraints, or dependencies.
acceptance_criteria: Start each acceptance criterion with an action verb
implementation_hints: Suggested libraries, patterns, or existing code to reference
notes: Optional: Clarifications, edge cases, or UX considerations.

title: Discrete, actionable piece of work
description: Implementation details for this task. Be specific about what needs to be done and any technical constraints.
acceptance_criteria: Optional: Specific completion criteria for this task
notes: Optional: Implementation notes, gotchas, or references.
prompt:
# Task Implementation Guide

## Goal
Implement [specific functionality] as defined in the task description.

## Context
This task is part of [user story title] which aims to [story goal].

## Requirements
- Requirement 1
- Requirement 2
- Requirement 3

## Technical Approach
1. Step 1: [description]
2. Step 2: [description]
3. Step 3: [description]

## Files to Modify
- `src/example/file.py` - [what to change]

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Unit tests pass
- [ ] Code reviewed and approved
- [ ] Documentation updated

## Notes
Add any additional context, edge cases, or considerations here.
